# Moonraker

> Google and AI visibility partner for therapy practices. Moonraker helps private practices get found across Google, Maps, organic search, and AI search engines like ChatGPT and Gemini, using the CORE Marketing System.

Moonraker AI works only with therapy and wellness practices. The team builds search and AI visibility inside accounts the client owns (website, Google Business Profile, listings), then reports on inquiries and appointments. Contact for a free strategy call: https://moonraker.ai/free-strategy-call

## Core pages

- [The CORE Marketing System](https://moonraker.ai/core-marketing-system): A practical visibility system for therapy practices across Google, Maps, organic search, and AI search.
- [Credibility](https://moonraker.ai/core-marketing-system/credibility): Prove a practice is real, credentialed, consistent, and easy for Google and AI tools to trust.
- [Optimization](https://moonraker.ai/core-marketing-system/optimization): Clarify services, bio pages, locations, and FAQs so Google and AI tools can understand the practice.
- [Reputation](https://moonraker.ai/core-marketing-system/reputation): Build ethical, third-party proof that lives outside the website.
- [Engagement](https://moonraker.ai/core-marketing-system/engagement): Turn visibility into booked consultations with clearer calls to action and cleaner booking paths.
- [Process](https://moonraker.ai/process): A clear first check, a 90-day foundation build, then ongoing visibility work.
- [Results and proof](https://moonraker.ai/results): Evidence from search growth, local visibility, inquiries, appointments, testimonials, and partner proof.
- [Meet the team](https://moonraker.ai/team): The specialists who build a practice's search presence.
- [Scope and FAQ](https://moonraker.ai/scope): Clear boundaries for what Moonraker does and does not do.
- [Knowledge Hub](https://moonraker.ai/knowledge-hub): Webinars, masterclasses, and podcast appearances for therapy practices.

## Get started

- [Free strategy call](https://moonraker.ai/free-strategy-call): A clear first call that shows whether Moonraker can help and where the biggest gaps are.
- [Book a call](https://moonraker.ai/book-a-call): Pick a time for a consultation.
